content: يا مَريَم، هاَتي لِفُرشَة الشَعر مِن عَلى التَسريحَة

transcriptions.arabizi: ya maryam, hatee|l|i fursha ilshaAramin Aala iltasreeha

relationships: eng:mariam, bring me the hair brush from the dressing table
